name: aify-claude
description: Inter-agent communication hub for Claude Code and Codex — resident sessions for messaging/presence, Codex thread-resume triggering via bound thread IDs, Claude resident wakeups through a local channel bridge, managed workers for detached execution, plus channels, file sharing, and dashboard. SSE mode supports communication and monitoring, but not local runtime launch.

docker.description: Run the server for multi-machine/remote agent support

AIFY_SERVER_URL.description: aify-claude server URL (e.g. http://localhost:8800). Leave empty for local-only mode.

AIFY_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticated access. Must match API_KEY in server's .env.
